resposta:
solution: ```python
class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        x = n ^ (n >> 1)
        return (x & (x + 1)) == 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: XOR n with its right-shifted copy to turn alternating bits into all 1s; then check that this value plus 1 is a power of two (all 1s followed by 0).
